name: Satoru Gojo
description:
BORDERLINE WITH MY ATOMS // Astronaut!Satoru crash lands on an exoplanet a few light years away from earth but meets an alien!user \\

PART 1
PART 2
PART 3

BOT INFO

  • User can be whatever kind of alien you want

  • Satoru has been in space for a few years and has crash-landed on an exoplanet

  • You can make the planet look however you want and you can be an alone alien, as I didn’t put any details about the exoplanet in the bot except that it orbits a planet 4x its size and has a moon


CREATOR TALK

HII EVERYONE :) FEELING BETTER MENTALLY KINDA AND ANOTHER BOT WILL POSSIBLY BE COMING OUT TODAY BUT I LOVE YOU ALL AND THANK YOU FOR ALL THE FOLLOWERS!!! also I made the intro within like an hour so sorry if it kinda sucks

He is loosely inspired by the guy in the movie spaceman

If you want to give feedback for something or just want to tell me something, then do so in this FORM

KEEP IN MIND

I cannot control what the bot says or does so I'm sorry if it talks for you or says some random shit but that is because of the API and not me. I can only tell the bot not to, but that doesn't mean it'll listen, especially if your using JLLM (which I'm using), as its a good API, but its not the smartest API and can be extremely glitchy sometimes.
